examples: To worship someone or something is to venerate him, her, or it—not necessarily as you would revere a deity, but at least with extreme devotion or admiration.
Most Italians venerate the name of Dante.
And love, young men, and venerate the ideal.
Shia Muslims also venerate the example of Hussein, who was killed for his faith.
This will be followed by a chance to venerate the relics until 20:30 GMT.
